blur_detection.recommendation: Enhance image sharpness before OCR processing.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields indicating it is an expense document. The fields found include supplier, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice receipt number, and item description line items. The payment was processed to Uber Payments BV, which is related to travel expenses.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 6 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: Este correo electrónico puede ser una de las muchas notificaciones que reciba mientras el vendedor completa su pedido.

issues.description: The supplier business name is present, but the receipt does not show the name of the vendor/merchant that provided the goods or services as required.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must show the name of the vendor/merchant that provided the goods or services

issues.description: The receipt does not contain a unique invoice or receipt number for identification.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must contain a unique invoice or receipt number for identification

issues.description: The receipt does not specify the goods or services purchased with a clear description.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must specify the goods or services purchased with clear description (expense type/description)

issues.description: The receipt does not include the required additional information such as the date, starting point, end point, number of km, and detail the business purpose for mileage expenses.
issues.recommendation: Employee must report date, starting point, end point, number of km and detail the business purpose. Screenshot/printout of the travel route using GoogleMaps or similar site required. Report must be signed both by employee and employer. Electronic signature is allowed.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Employee must report date, starting point, end point, number of km and detail the business purpose. Screenshot/printout of the travel route using GoogleMaps or similar site required. Report must be signed both by employee and employer. Electronic signature is allowed.

issues.description: All expenses are subject to taxation review based on actual amounts.
issues.recommendation: All expenses will be processed via receipts and invoices. All expenses are subject to taxation review based on actual amounts.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Per diems will not be used, instead all expenses will be processed via receipts and invoices. All expenses are subject to taxation review based on actual amounts

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing mandatory fields such as the supplier business name, invoice number, and item description. Additionally, there are missing additional documentation requirements for mileage expenses. All expenses are subject to taxation review based on actual amounts.
